title: Delicate Sweet Peruvian Sugar Snap Peas Suspiro Limeno
description: A sweet and flaky Peruvian dish featuring sugar snap peas, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and Whole30-friendly. This suspiro limeno style dessert is a unique and delicious treat.
instructions: In a blender, puree the sugar snap peas until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, honey, eggs, vanilla extract, salt, and cinnamon.
Add the pureed sugar snap peas to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Use a spatula to gently fold the mixture over onto itself, creating a layered effect.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
